page_metadata.biotools__summary: Curated information for 650 pairs of pathways from over 1600 publications. Report the molecular components (e.g. proteins, hormones, microRNAs) that mediate crosstalk between a pair of pathways and the species and tissue in which the crosstalk was observed.
